name: Zucchini Puffs
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Zucchini, grated, drained (in a colander)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour and baking powder. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine the egg, olive oil, 1/2 cup of milk, salt, and pepper. Beat to a smooth paste.
3. Gradually add the sifted flour mixture (consistency will be very stiff) while continuing to beat.
4. Add grated cheese and remaining milk to make a smooth but stiff batter. Blend in grated zucchini, garlic, onion, and parsley.
5. Heat oil for deep frying. Drop spoonfuls of batter into the hot oil.
6. Fry until golden brown. Remove with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
7. Keep warm until all are cooked. Season lightly with salt if desired and serve immediately.
